global.description: The ad features a modern blue background with bold text and geometric shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting an exclusive offer from StarVault.

elements.label: Blue abstract background
elements.description: A smooth blue background with abstract shapes creating a modern and dynamic feel.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, possibly representing a product or app interface.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes overlaying the background, adding depth and interest to the design.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top, featuring the word 'StarVault' in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Text in a clean, modern font stating 'Exclusive tonight Cancel anytime' positioned centrally.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon that adds a decorative touch to the overall design.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text at the top reading 'StarVault UGC', prominently displayed to attract attention.

elements.label: Offer details
elements.description: Text below the headline providing details about the offer, in a clear and readable font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed to stand out and encourage interaction.
